meaning: n.面容,外观,表面,外表,(生态学中的)演替系列优种社会,演替系列变群丛,[地]相
examples: A new mineral facies has been found for the first time in mathiasite, resembling priderite in composition.
It is the research on lithology and facies of volcanic reservoirs in Qingshen gas field of north Songliao basion.
The change of mineral facies is considered as one effect which affected on temperature to determine fluid inclusion by decrepitate.
